## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, progress, and programmatic SEO opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production increasing: 15 articles/week (10 refreshes, 5 new)](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO focus: Use case integration pages for connectors](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Website redesign in progress; content strategy to align with new design](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Revamping existing 600 connector pages + creating new use case pages](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [10 articles published this week (6 refreshes, 4 new)](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [2 more approved, pending publication](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [7 new refreshes in progress](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Increasing production to 15 articles/week (10 refreshes, 5 new)](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Feedback: Maintain existing charts/images in refreshed articles](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [500 articles in data engineering resources; \~200 removed, \~2,300 to review](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Fine-tune AI-generated titles to sound less robotic](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Provide 2-3 title variations for selection](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Focus on subtopics derived from parental topics](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Avoid cannibalization by checking existing rankings and content](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

### Programmatic SEO Opportunities

  - [Use case integration pages identified as high-priority](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Potential for thousands of new pages based on 550 sources, 20 destinations](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Group similar connectors (e.g., ad platforms) for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Create separate use case pages, interlink with connector pages](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Develop a filterable use case library (marketing, finance, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)

### Website Redesign Considerations

  - [Redesign launching in \~1 month](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Begin content strategy work now, align with new design later](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Revamp existing 600 connector pages](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Add use cases to existing pages and create new use case-specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

  - [Team to review and provide feedback on V1 concepts](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Coordinate with development team for data requirements](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Create wireframes and designs for new page types](https://fathom.video/share/yyixKpQHby8doPy79ctrF6FbPerSRo-B?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
